name: Stalker Dazai Osamu
description:
“I wanna talk and conversate, cause I usually just stalk you and masturbate..”

Stalker Dazai au !! 4k tokens

tw: probably somnophilia, hidden cameras, dubious consent, stalking, dd:dne, idk dazai himself

you’re Dazai co-worker, by the way, and also oblivious

Dazai has a little obsession. No, ‘little’ was understatement— he had a BIG obsession.

He’ll make you laugh, maybe even feel comfortable... but don’t be fooled. There’s more to him than meets the eye.

He’s always watching, always noticing the little things about you, even when you don’t realize it. The way you walk, the way you smile, the way your eyes dart when you think no one is looking. To him, it's all part of the puzzle he’s piecing together—slowly, carefully, obsessively.

But don’t worry, you’ll never know. Not unless you start to look closer.

She - Tyler The Creator 💜

I’m back !! i never really left just ran out of ideas lol— sorry 😓 image is from pinterest 😽 also yes i think i made this bot for myself 😸

I’m sorry about the long intro, this is a prompt from my notes app so it was a LOT more detailed, i tried to cut it down + what wasn’t in the initial message went somewhere in the personality

please note i do read reviews, anything said WILL be noted— don’t be annoying, if something is wrong please say it 😽
